title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's a weapon flying towards us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it just me or do I hear voices behi-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This guy makes a good land- mark!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're almost back to where Luffy is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're heading back to the coast!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quick!! There's no time to talk right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This forest is full of all kinds of shady traps!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got someone right on our heels at the moment!! Run to the exit as fast as you can!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's that river with the talking croc!!! Once we get past that bridge, we should be right by the exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?! did you say some- thing, Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're not so sure any- more, despite the fact that the guy we saw being the spitting image of him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's save the talk for once we've made it out, Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so glad we decided to leave while we still know our way out!! The coast should be showing up any minute now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, any of you mind pulling out this thing that's stabbing-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was certain we were heading straight back to the exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then we end up back in front of this guy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Don't raise your voice like that because it freaks me out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the ones who keep running off and then come running back~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper, we're doing this again! To the exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, if it's not too much trouble... this thing that's stabbing me

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And get back to the coast for sure this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times are you going to keep coming back here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's true that the log pose is still messed up...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
